# Daily Report — 2026-07-24

## Tasks Completed

### 1. Add create_problem and update_problem to service_desk package
Both tools existed in the `change_coordinator` and `full` packages but were missing from
`service_desk`. Added them to the Problem Management section of `config/tool_packages.yaml`
so service desk agents can now create and update problem records directly.

### 2. Implement delete_asset_contract tool
New `delete_asset_contract` function added to `contract_tools.py`:
- Issues `DELETE /api/now/table/alm_contract/{sys_id}`
- Returns 404 guard with clear message when contract is absent
- Handles 200 and 204 success codes
- `DeleteAssetContractParams` Pydantic model with required `sys_id`
- Registered in `__init__.py`, `tool_utils.py`, and `tool_packages.yaml`
  (system_administrator + full packages)
- 10 new tests covering success, 404, HTTP error, connection error, missing params,
  no-instance-url, no-headers paths

## Test Results
- Total tests: 2395

- System environment vulnerabilities in setuptools, urllib3, wheel (not project deps)
- No project-level vulnerabilities
